response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the song 'Aozora no Rhapsody'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for both original Japanese lyrics and English translations. Manual transcription was performed for the prominent visual intro text (song title and credits). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal bursts. Instantaneous transitions (end time equals next start time) are applied during rapid segments to prevent cascading delays. Subtitles for on-screen text were included for its duration of visibility.

subtitles.english: chu chu yeah!

subtitles.english: please me!

subtitles.original: chu chu yeah!
subtitles.english: chu chu yeah!

subtitles.english: without you!

subtitles.original: 青空のラプソディ / 作詞：林英樹 作曲：佐藤純一
subtitles.english: [Title: Aozora no Rhapsody / Lyrics: Hideki Hayashi, Music: Junichi Sato]

subtitles.original: あー！なんてことだ 些細な過ちだ
subtitles.english: Ah! What's this, a trivial mistake?

subtitles.original: 自分のことにタララッタラッタ手焼く
subtitles.english: I'm fiddling with things of my own

subtitles.original: どうして突然？逃げ切ったっていいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Why so sudden? It's fine to just run away, right?

subtitles.original: だけどなんだか気まぐれモードになり
subtitles.english: But somehow, I'm in a whim mode

subtitles.original: そんな気分になっちゃって
subtitles.english: And I ended up in that mood

subtitles.original: 始まりはそんな風で
subtitles.english: It started like that

subtitles.original: つまりはらしくないようで
subtitles.english: In short, it doesn't seem like me

subtitles.original: でも今じゃ扉開けてほら 声が聴こえるよ
subtitles.english: But now I open the door and look, I can hear your voice

subtitles.original: さあ！行こう！ どこへでも
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's go! Anywhere!

subtitles.original: 僕は君の翼に なれる勇気があるよ！
subtitles.english: I have the courage to become your wings!

subtitles.original: (please stay with me)
subtitles.english: (please stay with me)

subtitles.original: どんな試練も怖くない
subtitles.english: I'm not afraid of any trials

subtitles.original: その魔法があるから
subtitles.english: Because I have that magic

subtitles.original: (なんてったってコングラッチュレーション！)
subtitles.english: (Congratulations, no matter what!)

subtitles.original: 初めて出会う世界に 花束を贈ろう
subtitles.english: Let's give a bouquet to the world we meet for the first time

subtitles.original: (made in society)
subtitles.english: (made in society)

subtitles.original: ただこの瞬間結ばれるよ
subtitles.english: Just in this moment, we are connected

subtitles.original: ちぐはぐなコミュニケーション？
subtitles.english: Incoherent communication?

subtitles.original: でも別に構わない 明日から平和なら！
subtitles.english: But I don't care, as long as it's peaceful from tomorrow!

subtitles.original: chu chu yeah! without you!
subtitles.english: chu chu yeah! without you!

subtitles.original: あー！どうしてまた素直になれなくて
subtitles.english: Ah! Why can't I be honest again?

subtitles.original: 自分のことでチュルルッチュルッチュ火吹く
subtitles.english: I'm blowing fire with my own things

subtitles.original: ギアはそのまま スピード上げていこう
subtitles.english: Gear is as is, let's turn up the speed

subtitles.original: だけどなんだか黄昏モードになり
subtitles.english: But somehow, I'm in a twilight mode

subtitles.original: いつかを思い出しちゃって
subtitles.english: And I ended up remembering someday

subtitles.original: 一人でいても嫌じゃない
subtitles.english: Even if I'm alone, it's not bad

subtitles.original: 誰にも頼らなくてもいい
subtitles.english: I don't have to rely on anyone

subtitles.original: でも扉の向こう騒がしい 声が聞きたいよ
subtitles.english: But I want to hear the noisy voice beyond the door

subtitles.original: 今！行こう！ どこへでも
subtitles.english: Now! Let's go! Anywhere!

subtitles.original: 僕は君を背中に 乗せて空を舞うよ！
subtitles.english: I will carry you on my back and fly in the sky!

subtitles.original: (please fly with me)
subtitles.english: (please fly with me)

subtitles.original: いつか心が離れても
subtitles.english: Even if our hearts drift apart someday

subtitles.original: その時は笑ってて
subtitles.english: At that time, keep smiling

subtitles.original: (なんてったってコングラッチュレーション)
subtitles.english: (Congratulations, no matter what)

subtitles.original: 守りたいこの世界に 青空のラプソディ
subtitles.english: In this world I want to protect, an Aozora no Rhapsody

subtitles.original: (make me rhapsodic!)
subtitles.english: (make me rhapsodic!)

subtitles.original: ただいつまでも奏でていてよ
subtitles.english: Just keep playing it forever

subtitles.original: 凸凹なコンビネーション？
subtitles.english: Uneven combination?

subtitles.original: でも別に大丈夫さ 明日はまた平和だ！
subtitles.english: But it's fine, tomorrow will be peaceful again!

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな傷を 太陽にさらして
subtitles.english: Expose a tiny wound to the sun

subtitles.original: 分け合ったよ君と 痛みは熱さの中に溶けてく！
subtitles.english: I shared it with you, the pain dissolves into the heat!
